scripts.build:win: RD /S /Q assets\build || babel assets/src/modules -d assets/build/js --minified && stylus assets/src/index.styl -o assets/build/css/bundle.css -c -r --include-css
scripts.build:unix: rm assets/build -rf && babel assets/src/modules -d assets/build/js --minified && stylus assets/src/index.styl -o assets/build/css/bundle.css -c -r --include-css
